title: @_philschmid: Read the technical reports on how @Kimi_Moonshot, @cursor_ai, and @trychroma tra...
rawContent:
Tweet by @_philschmid (Philipp Schmid)
Author bio: AI Developer Experience @GoogleDeepMind | prev: Tech Lead at @huggingface, AWS ML Hero 🤗 Sharing my own views and AI News 🧑🏻‍💻 https://t.co/7IosdlNz22
Text: Read the technical reports on how @Kimi_Moonshot, @cursor_ai, and @trychroma train vertical agentic models with RL. Same underlying recipe, strong base model, train inside the production harness, outcome-based rewards.

- Kimi K2.5 learns to spawn parallel sub-agents through RL.
-Cursor uses the same production Harness (same tools, same prompts..) and leanrs self-summarization during RL.
- Chroma's 20B retrieval model learns to prune its own context mid-search.

Full write-up 👇
